title: Realization/reachability receipt — artifact actually reachable, not just identified
independenceNote: signature-provenance only; referent agent-authored (the external producer proves the receipt was not forged in-process, NOT that the referent is independent)
anchors: core/gate-preconditions.ts (checkRealization + checkProductionReality rung 7 + gate-time opportunistic migration stamp)

title: Assertion-quality / mutation-kill receipt — trusted runner observes test quality
independenceNote: signature-provenance only, over a bounded single-module mutation scope: the 2b external Ed25519-signed MutationKillReceipt control-flip proves the receipt was not forged in-process (the in-process surface holds no key ⇒ a wrong-key/unsigned line classifies forged and BLOCKs mutation_kill_forged; a producer-signed line classifies valid-grounded). The module-scoped efficacy signal is a DISTINCT observability axis that NEVER overrides the per-REQ assertion-presence rung (presence ≠ efficacy, review HIGH). The 2a in-process AssertionPresenceReceipt remains attribution-only (agent-mintable ⇒ valid/attested-presence, never valid-grounded)

title: VerificationDriver — trusted runner records which verification dimensions were exercised
Terminal-transition receipt — self-attested state flip bound to re-checkable source+snapshot
Dimension-set-coverage rung — completion asserts coverage of the declared spec dimension set
independenceNote: Done-phase only (producer_identity zero-trust). The coverage verdict's integrity is the gate's LIVE recompute of `declared ⊆ observed` over a COMMITTED declared-set artifact (core/declared-dimensions.ts, Interp A — narrowing it is a reviewable src/+dist/ diff, never a runtime self-attest) + observed re-derived from verify-report.json; the DimensionSetCoverageReceipt's stored verdict is never trusted. Independent out-of-process keyed grounding is the deferred P4-5 extraction.

title: Human-approval rung — external-signed approval over the closed required set
Tier↔complexity correspondence receipt + stage-invalidation
anchors: core/receipts.ts (TierCorrespondenceReceipt store: schema + canonicalText + append/read/verifyChain + computeBriefDigest)
commands/state.ts (applyGateMutation mints TierCorrespondenceReceipt; raw state set tier reject preserved)
independenceNote: Done-phase only; producer_identity carries zero in-process trust weight (agent-mintable). The gate RE-DERIVES min-tier from classifyBrief(docs/00-task-brief.md) and the brief digest at gate time (recompute-don't-trust); the receipt is the F8 correspondence artifact, not an independence anchor. The independent (un-forgeable) producer is the P4-5 trust-boundary extraction milestone.

title: MCP toToolResult projection oracle + readiness-from-scores receipt
independenceNote: signature-provenance only: the external Ed25519-signed InterviewReadinessReceipt control-flip proves the receipt was not forged in-process (the in-process surface holds no key ⇒ a wrong-key/unsigned line classifies forged and BLOCKs bsc9_unverified; a producer-signed line classifies valid-grounded). The scored judgment remains agent-authored — this proves the readiness receipt was not forged in-process, NOT that the judgment is independent. The projection oracle is a structural correspondence (toToolResult fidelity over a committed fixture set), attribution-only. Done-final deferred to P4-5.

title: External-Reference Grounding — computable ground that the real external reference was checked
independenceNote: signature-provenance only; external Ed25519-signed grounding control-flip proves the receipt was not forged in-process (producer-signed ⇒ valid-grounded/PASS; wrong-key/unsigned ⇒ forged+BLOCK). Honest scope: single-axis at the Ed25519 boundary; budgets 3-party-signed (agent cannot self-sign its own budget). Slice C (C4a/b/c/d): per-receipt grounding_bound opt-in ⇒ manifest_digest_absent block; BSC-7 β-acceptance leg consumes the grounding verdict; visual/a11y observed-vs-signed-budget tolerance threshold (recompute-don't-trust — a generous self-reported status cannot mask a breached signed budget; CAVEAT (sec-review HIGH): the THRESHOLD is 3-party-signed, but OBSERVED is producer-measured/3-party only for EXTERNAL valid-grounded receipts — for in-process receipts observed is agent-authored/attribution-trust, so the recompute catches a lying status, NOT a lying observed; require-external for tolerance kinds is the P4 require-grounded tightening); visual-hash flipped to ENFORCE so all ground-kinds now enforce. Renderer/axe MEASUREMENT deferred to producer/CI (producer signs a report, never measures).
anchors: core/gate-preconditions.ts (evaluateGrounding + checkGrounding + hoisted-verdict split rung; hasUnboundGroundingReceipt/manifest_digest_absent @ C4a; β-acceptance consume @ C4b; toleranceThresholdVerdicts @ C4c)
